# Feature: Collections Pane Menu Actions

## 1. Feature Goal

**ID**: FEAT-002  
**Source Plan**: `.spec-lite/plan_pane_actions.md`

Standardize the Collections pane action menus so collection, folder, and request rows all support consistent iconized actions (Run/Rename/Delete), destructive confirms, and inline rename with sibling-level uniqueness checks.

This feature makes the Collections pane behaviorally consistent with the other sidebar panes while ensuring collection mutations are persisted through the adapter boundary and reflected in Zustand state.

> DEVIATION: The plan assumes `deleteRequestFromCollection` is already functional for nested folder/request deletion. Current adapter implementations show gaps (`packages/web/src/adapters/webAdapter.ts` is a no-op for nested delete, and `packages/vscode/src/webview/adapters/vsCodeAdapter.ts` posts a message type that is not handled by `MessageHandler`). To satisfy the plan requirement of "working delete," this feature includes adapter/backend parity work for nested item deletion.

---

## 2. Data Model (Granular)

`.spec-lite/data_model.md` does not exist. This feature uses existing collection entities and adds UI-level interaction state plus runtime constraints.

### Entities & Attributes

- **`Collection`** (existing persisted model)
  - `info.waveId` (string) - stable collection identity.
  - `info.name` (string) - display name edited by collection-level rename.
  - `filename` (string, optional) - persistence key used by storage adapters.
  - `item` (`CollectionItem[]`) - root tree nodes.

- **`CollectionItem`** (existing persisted model)
  - `id` (string) - stable node identity for folder/request actions.
  - `name` (string) - display name edited by folder/request rename.
  - `item` (`CollectionItem[] | undefined`) - child nodes when folder.
  - `request` (`CollectionRequest | undefined`) - request payload when leaf.

- **`CollectionsPane` UI state** (new/extended local component state)
  - `editingCollectionFilename` (`string | null`) - collection currently in inline rename mode.
  - `editingCollectionNameDraft` (string) - draft collection rename text.
  - `editingTreeItemId` (`string | null`) - folder/request currently in inline rename mode.
  - `editingTreeItemDraft` (string) - draft folder/request rename text.
  - `pendingDeleteTarget` (discriminated union) - currently selected deletion target for confirm flow:
    - `scope: 'collection' | 'folder' | 'request'`
    - `collectionFilename` (string)
    - `collectionName` (string)
    - `itemPath` (`string[]`, for folder/request)
    - `itemId` (string, for folder/request)

### Relationships

- `Collection` 1:N `CollectionItem` via root `item[]`.
- `CollectionItem` (folder) 1:N `CollectionItem` via nested `item[]`.
- `pendingDeleteTarget` references either one collection by `filename` or one nested node by (`collectionFilename`, `itemPath`, `itemId`).

### Indexes & Constraints

- Sibling-level uniqueness constraint for rename targets:
  - Collection rename must be unique against all other collection names (case-insensitive, trimmed).
  - Folder/request rename must be unique within the same parent folder level (case-insensitive, trimmed).
- Empty rename drafts normalize to fallback labels:
  - collection -> `Untitled Collection`
  - folder/request -> existing name (no destructive overwrite to empty)
- Deletion only mutates store after successful adapter confirmation (`Result.isOk === true`).

---

## 3. Files

List of files this feature is expected to create or modify:

- `packages/core/src/components/common/CollectionsPane.tsx` - Collection-level dropdown actions, inline rename, delete confirmation wiring.
- `packages/core/src/components/common/CollectionTreeItem.tsx` - Folder/request dropdown actions, inline rename, sibling uniqueness checks, delete confirmation trigger wiring.
- `packages/core/src/utils/collectionParser.ts` - Add or reuse immutable tree helper utilities for nested rename/delete path operations.
- `packages/core/src/test/components/common/CollectionsPane.test.tsx` - New component tests for collection-level menu actions.
- `packages/core/src/test/components/common/CollectionTreeItem.test.tsx` - New component tests for folder/request-level menu actions.
- `packages/core/src/test/mocks/mockAdapter.ts` - Improve nested delete behavior in `deleteRequestFromCollection` mock to support realistic test assertions.
- `packages/web/src/adapters/webAdapter.ts` - Implement actual nested delete behavior for `deleteRequestFromCollection`.
- `packages/vscode/src/webview/adapters/vsCodeAdapter.ts` - Ensure nested delete returns updated collection through request/response flow.
- `packages/vscode/src/handlers/MessageHandler.ts` - Add handler for `deleteCollection` and `deleteRequestFromCollection` messages and emit updated collection payloads.
- `packages/shared/src/services/CollectionService.ts` - Add service-level method for removing nested folder/request by (`filename`, `itemPath`, `itemId`) and return updated collection.
- `packages/server/src/routes/collections.ts` - Add REST endpoint for nested collection item deletion to back the web adapter.
- `packages/vscode/src/test/handlers/MessageHandler.test.ts` - Add/extend tests for delete message handling in extension host.
- `packages/web/src/test/adapters/webAdapter.test.ts` - Add adapter tests for nested deletion behavior.

---

## 4. Dependencies

- **FEAT-001** (Shared confirmation dialog hook) must remain available and used for destructive actions.
- Existing collection read/write adapter plumbing (`loadCollections`, `saveCollection`, `deleteCollection`, `deleteRequestFromCollection`) must be consumed through `useStorageAdapter()` only.
- No new infrastructure dependencies.

---

## 5. Implementation Tasks

### TASK-001: Add collection-level Rename/Delete actions with confirm and icon parity

- [ ] **Implementation**: Update `CollectionsPane.tsx` collection header dropdown to include iconized actions (`PlayIcon`, `PencilIcon`, `Trash2Icon` with red delete style). Add inline rename mode for collection name (Enter/blur commit, Escape cancel). On commit, enforce unique collection name (case-insensitive) against peers, then persist by mutating `collection.info.name` and calling `storageAdapter.saveCollection(updatedCollection)` followed by store `updateCollection`. Wire delete through `useConfirmDialog`; on confirm call `storageAdapter.deleteCollection(filename)` and then `removeCollection(collection.info.name)`.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Create/extend `CollectionsPane.test.tsx` to verify: (1) menu renders Run/Rename/Delete with icons and delete red class, (2) rename opens inline input and commits on Enter, (3) duplicate collection rename shows error notification and does not persist, (4) delete opens confirm dialog and only deletes on confirm.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add/refresh JSDoc in `CollectionsPaneProps` and action handlers describing rename uniqueness and delete confirmation lifecycle.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- CollectionsPane` and manually confirm collection-level menu behavior in both VS Code webview and web app.

### TASK-002: Add folder/request Rename actions with sibling-level uniqueness

- [ ] **Implementation**: Update `CollectionTreeItem.tsx` dropdown menus to include `Rename` with `PencilIcon` for folders and requests, preserving existing `Run` on folders. Add inline editing state for node rows, scoped by node `id`. Implement sibling-level uniqueness checks based on the node's parent path. Persist rename by producing an immutably updated collection tree and saving with `storageAdapter.saveCollection(updatedCollection)`, then applying `updateCollection` in store.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Create/extend `CollectionTreeItem.test.tsx` to verify: (1) folder and request rows show Rename action, (2) rename inline input appears and commits/cancels correctly, (3) duplicate sibling rename is rejected with notification, (4) same-name no-op does not call adapter save.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add component-level comments/JSDoc for tree rename behavior, including sibling uniqueness rule and path resolution expectations.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- CollectionTreeItem` and validate nested rename behavior manually for root and deeply nested folders.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001.

### TASK-003: Implement folder/request Delete flows with confirmation and correct store updates

- [ ] **Implementation**: Add `Delete` action with `Trash2Icon` + red style to folder/request menus in `CollectionTreeItem.tsx`, wired to `useConfirmDialog`. On confirm, call `storageAdapter.deleteRequestFromCollection(collectionFilename, itemPath, itemId)` and update store with returned collection via `updateCollection(collectionName, { item: updated.item, info: updated.info })` (or equivalent immutable update contract). Ensure cancellation is non-destructive and adapter errors surface via `notification.showNotification('error', message)`.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add coverage that delete opens confirm dialog, cancel does nothing, confirm calls adapter with correct (`collectionFilename`, `itemPath`, `itemId`) and updates rendered tree. Include both request deletion and folder deletion scenarios.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add inline "why" comments around delete payload construction (`itemPath` + `itemId`) and update handler decisions.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test -- CollectionTreeItem` and validate UI tree updates immediately after confirmed delete.
- **Depends on**: TASK-002.

### TASK-004: Close adapter/backend parity gaps so nested delete is truly functional on all platforms

- [ ] **Implementation**: Complete `deleteRequestFromCollection` end-to-end behavior for both runtimes: (a) `packages/web` adds a real API call and returns updated collection from server, (b) `packages/server` + `packages/shared` add nested delete route/service logic, (c) `packages/vscode` adapter and `MessageHandler` add request/response handling for `deleteCollection` and `deleteRequestFromCollection` with updated collection payloads. Keep all operations within existing adapter/service boundaries and return `Result` consistently.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add/extend tests in `packages/web/src/test/adapters/webAdapter.test.ts` and `packages/vscode/src/test/handlers/MessageHandler.test.ts` to validate nested delete success and error branches. Update `packages/core/src/test/mocks/mockAdapter.ts` behavior so component tests can assert real nested removal semantics.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add JSDoc/comments to new service and handler methods documenting expected payload shape and success response contract for nested delete.
- **Verify**: Run targeted tests for web adapter + vscode handler suites, then run `pnpm test` to ensure no regressions across packages.
- **Depends on**: TASK-003.

---

## 6. Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Auth**: N/A.
- **Error Handling**: Every storage call must follow `Result<T, E>` checks. UI must surface adapter failures through `notification.showNotification('error', message)` and avoid optimistic store mutation before confirmed success.
- **Logging**: Reuse existing service/handler logging patterns for adapter/backend delete failures with operation context (`collectionFilename`, `itemPath`, `itemId`) while avoiding sensitive payload logging.

---

- [x] TASK-002: Add folder/request Rename actions with sibling-level uniqueness
- [x] TASK-003: Implement folder/request Delete flows with confirmation and correct store updates
- [x] TASK-004: Close adapter/backend parity gaps so nested delete is truly functional on all platforms
